heading: What's often not included by default

cards.title: Wi-Fi
cards.text: Free at most resorts now, but still charged at some budget properties — we confirm this before booking.

cards.title: Excursions
cards.text: Diving, sandbank trips, and sunset cruises are almost always priced separately from your room rate.

cards.title: Alcohol at guesthouses
cards.text: Not available at all on local islands, by law — not a pricing issue, but a real difference from resort budgeting.

cards.title: Single supplement
cards.text: Solo travelers often pay a surcharge on double-occupancy room rates — we'll flag this upfront if it applies to your booking.
